name: Future Generation Australia Limited
analysis: FGX has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3513. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
